claim: Making predictions and betting on them is the most effective way to gain early access to emerging technologies before they become mainstream
actionable: Set aside time to make 3-5 concrete predictions about AI development, tools, or industry shifts for the next 12 months, then actively prepare infrastructure or skills to capitalize on those predictions before they materialize.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: AI coding will become the standard for engineers in 2025, and those not using AI to code risk becoming unemployable
actionable: Adopt an AI coding tool (Cursor, Aider, or similar) as your primary development environment within the next month; integrate it into your daily workflow for all non-trivial tasks.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: There is no AI scaling wall; language models will continue to improve across all benchmarks in 2025 and beyond through synthetic data, new architectures, and alternative paradigms
actionable: Base your product roadmap and hiring decisions on the assumption of continuous LLM improvements; do not assume current model capabilities represent a ceiling.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Agentic coding tools will reach practical usability in 2025, but will remain limited to simple to medium-difficulty tasks rather than replacing human engineers entirely
actionable: Identify 3-5 concrete development tasks in your workflow that are currently tier-2 (AI assistant-level) and experiment with tier-3 agentic tools to establish your comfort threshold for autonomous coding.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: The cost of writing code will continue to decline to near-zero while the cost of engineering expertise, judgment, and experience will rise dramatically
actionable: Shift your focus from coding speed to architectural thinking, problem definition, and product sense; invest in developing specialized domain expertise that cannot be easily commoditized.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Specialized language models for specific use cases (e.g., coding-focused models like DeepSeek V3) will emerge as a dominant product category in 2025
actionable: Evaluate single-purpose AI agent platforms and specialized LLMs for your specific domain (legal, medical, code, etc.); prioritize tools built around domain-specific models over general-purpose alternatives.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Context windows will expand to 1-5 million tokens in leading base models during 2025, but most engineers are not yet utilizing existing context windows effectively
actionable: Start incrementally increasing your prompt context size; experiment with loading entire codebases, documentation, or knowledge bases into a single prompt to understand the impact on model output quality.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: GPT-4o-level small language models will be embedded directly into consumer operating systems and devices by end of 2025, enabling on-device AI without internet
actionable: Monitor OS releases (macOS, Windows) for on-device model integrations; test and evaluate these models for privacy-sensitive use cases as they become available.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Open AI will maintain its lead in LLM development through 2025 and retain the crown for best-in-class models, despite competition from Google, Anthropic, and Meta
actionable: For mission-critical AI applications, prioritize OpenAI's latest models; maintain flexibility to switch if competitors release demonstrably superior alternatives.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: The AI job market will see massive decline in entry-level and junior engineering positions while senior+ and AI-specialist opportunities expand to new highs
actionable: If you are mid-level or junior, immediately begin building specialized expertise in AI/ML, system design, or domain-specific knowledge; generic full-stack work will not be defensible.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Principles-based AI coding education focused on mental models will outlast tool-specific training as coding environments continue to rapidly evolve
actionable: When learning AI coding, prioritize understanding the underlying philosophy and patterns (prompting, context management, tool use) rather than mastering any single tool's UI.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS

claim: Engineers achieved 87% accuracy in AI predictions in 2024 (36 correct out of 41 bets), with 66% accuracy in 2023, suggesting prediction-making is a learnable and valuable skill
actionable: Document your own AI predictions quarterly; review accuracy monthly to refine your forecasting model and identify systematic biases in your thinking.
source_title: AI Coding is here... What's next? My 2025 GenAI BIG BETS
